user_query: My family and I are planning a movie night and we want to decorate the living room with movie posters. Can you fetch the posters for the movies 'The Lion King' released in 1994 and 'Frozen' released in 2013? Additionally, could you provide me with the top-rated animated movies according to IMDB?

TaskList.description: Fetch the movie poster for 'The Lion King' released in 1994.
Fetch the movie poster for 'Frozen' released in 2013.
Retrieve the top-rated animated movies according to IMDB.
Collect all movie posters fetched in steps 1 and 2 along with the top-rated movies list for printing or displaying.
